ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "geographic_description" TEXT /* Geographic description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the municipality is located in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the municipality */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the municipality in km^2 */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_municipalities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_categories" (
  "material_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material category */,
  "material_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the material category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material category */,
  "density_kg_m3" REAL /* Density of the material in kg/m^3 */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_material_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_category_id") REFERENCES material_categories ("material_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material usage record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality where the material is used */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material used */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the material was used */,
  "consumption_rate" REAL /* Consumption rate of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality for which the prediction is made */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material for which the prediction is made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_quantity" INTEGER /* Predicted quantity of the material */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
column_names: ID of the region the municipality is located in
Area of the municipality in km^2
Unique identifier for each material category
Density of the material in kg/m^3
Cost per unit of the material
